ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Scope: employee HR/payroll, board materials, shareholder registry, and acquisition diligence prepared for Tokyo Stock Exchange (TSE) timely disclosure (TDnet) where applicable.
We do not store brokerage account numbers
cross-border transfers otherwise require prior consent with notice of foreign regime per APPI and logging of onward disclosure
restricted to directors, officers, and designated insiders
inadvertent selective disclosure is cured by prompt TDnet release
Blackout references in legacy calendars (FY2024 Q4) were completed and are not currently in force
a proposed business combination with Komae Systems G.K
Identifiers in internal test forms (e.g., 0000-0000-0000 for My Number, HRK-EMP-12345 for employee ID) are placeholders and not processed as actual personal data
Specific Personal Information (My Number/個人番号) is collected only for tax and social insurance, stored encrypted, and segregated
Until TDnet release scheduled for 2026-07-15 08:30 JST
